name: Sausage Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam tempeh for 15 minutes.
2. Cool, then grate on coarse side of grater.
3. Mix together dry seasonings (sage, marjoram, thyme, cumin).
4. Stir in warm water, oil, and soy sauce.
5. Press firmly into thin patties.
6. Fry in a little oil until browned on both sides.
Italian Sausage:
1. Grate the steamed tempeh.
2. Mix together dry seasonings (2 garlic cloves pressed, 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes, 1 t oregano, 1/4 tsp black pepper).
3. Combine tempeh, dry seasonings, oil, and soy sauce.
4. Press into thin patties or crumble on top of pizza before baking.
